headline: Carnival (CCL) Unveils Ace Class With Carnival Destiny Set For 2029
summary: Carnival (NYSE:CCL) introduced its new Ace Class of ships, led by the Carnival Destiny, as a major refresh of its cruise product. Carnival Destiny is planned as the first Ace Class vessel, with entry into service targeted for 2029. The Ace Class design centers on extensive glass for ocean views, mostly new onboard venues and attractions, and curated Caribbean itineraries. The concept focuses on closer guest interaction with the sea and tailored experiences on exclusive Caribbean...

headline: SEABOURN UNVEILS DETAILS OF 'THE RUBY COLLECTION': 54 VOYAGES ACROSS OCEAN AND EXPEDITION FOR ITS 40TH ANNIVERSARY IN 2028
summary: Seabourn has revealed "The Ruby Collection," a curated series of 54 voyages in 2028 to commemorate the line's 40th anniversary. Spanning its fleet of five luxury ships, the collection features enhanced onboard offerings, exclusive experiences, and access to destinations where larger ships cannot reach.

content.title: SEABOURN UNVEILS DETAILS OF 'THE RUBY COLLECTION': 54 VOYAGES ACROSS OCEAN AND EXPEDITION FOR ITS 40TH ANNIVERSARY IN 2028
content.summary: Seabourn has revealed "The Ruby Collection," a curated series of 54 voyages in 2028 to commemorate the line's 40th anniversary. Spanning its fleet of five luxury ships, the collection features enhanced onboard offerings, exclusive experiences, and access to destinations where larger ships cannot reach.

thumbnail.caption: From yacht harbors to polar regions, the Ruby Collection commemorates Seabourn’s Ruby Jubilee with Yachtsman sailings, newly designed itineraries and notable voyages
